title: BLS Time Series Data Request
description: Request schema for the BLS Public Data API v2 POST endpoint to retrieve one or more time series.

seriesid.title: Series IDs
seriesid.description: Array of BLS series identifiers to retrieve. V1 supports up to 25; V2 supports up to 50.

items.description: A valid BLS series identifier beginning with the two-letter survey abbreviation.

startyear.title: Start Year
startyear.description: First year for which to return data. Four-digit year. V1 allows up to 10 years range; V2 allows up to 20 years.

endyear.title: End Year
endyear.description: Last year for which to return data. Four-digit year. Must be >= startyear.

registrationkey.title: Registration Key
registrationkey.description: BLS API registration key for Version 2.0 access. Enables higher limits and additional response fields. Obtain free at https://data.bls.gov/registrationEngine/.

catalog.title: Include Catalog Metadata
catalog.description: When true, includes catalog metadata for each series (series title, survey name, seasonality, measure type, demographic filters). Version 2.0 only.

calculations.title: Include Calculations
calculations.description: When true, includes net change and percent change calculations for each data point. Version 2.0 only.

annualaverage.title: Include Annual Averages
annualaverage.description: When true, includes annual average values (period M13) where available. Version 2.0 only.

aspects.title: Include Aspects
aspects.description: When true, returns aspect data associated with the series where applicable. Version 2.0 only.
